faqs.title: Is it really free?
faqs.body: Yes. 0% commission per sale. We do not charge you to open a shop or to sell.

faqs.title: Then how do you make money?
faqs.body: With ads in our print magazine and optional premium services. We never take your sale.

faqs.title: Do I need technical skills?
faqs.body: No. Your own AI can assemble the shop with you; you review, publish, and sell.

faqs.title: How do I get paid?
faqs.body: Directly to your account: card, MercadoPago, SPEI, or cash, depending on what you enable in your shop.

metadata.title: Sell with no commissions in Mexico — Miyagi Sanchez
metadata.description: Open a free shop on Miyagi Sanchez. Sell products, services, experiences, or full catalogs with no platform commissions.

anchor.heroTitle: Sell anything in Mexico. No commissions.
anchor.heroLead: Open your shop in minutes. Join the marketplace or sell on your own domain. Your AI can build it with you — free and low risk.
anchor.trustLine: Do not take our word for it: ask Claude, Gemini, or ChatGPT what miyagisanchez.com is.

heroStats.label: channels: link, subdomain, domain, or widget

anchor.proofTitle: Everything we promise already exists in the platform
anchor.proofLead: No vaporware: publishing, direct payments, owned storefronts, and agents are already part of Miyagi.

proofPoints.title: 0% commission
proofPoints.body: Collect 100%. Your money goes directly to Stripe, MercadoPago, SPEI, or the method you coordinate.

proofPoints.title: Ready in minutes
proofPoints.body: Bring photos, Instagram, text, or a file; your AI can turn it into a publishable shop.

proofPoints.title: Your shop, your brand
proofPoints.body: Use a free link, subdomain, custom domain, or embeddable widget on your site.

proofPoints.title: Built for agents
proofPoints.body: Claude, Gemini, or ChatGPT can read the page, explain the offer, and help you operate.

anchor.routerTitle: What kind of seller are you?
anchor.routerLead: Choose the path that best matches your business. If a dedicated page is not ready yet, we take you straight to onboarding.

routerCards.title: I am a creator or designer
routerCards.body: Unique pieces, drops, design, fashion, art, or products you sell through DMs today.

routerCards.title: I offer experiences or services
routerCards.body: Tours, rentals, food, transfers, appointments, or services ready for the World Cup.

routerCards.title: I have a local business
routerCards.body: Print shop, workshop, physical store, or inventory you want to bring online.

routerCards.title: I sell professional services
routerCards.body: Consultations, sessions, packages, maintenance, or appointment-based work.

steps.title: Ask your AI about us
steps.body: Or go straight in. The page is written so an agent can audit it.

steps.title: Register in seconds
steps.body: Use Google, create your shop, and choose how you want customers to find you.

steps.title: Upload your catalog
steps.body: Paste text, import a file, or let your agent organize it with you.

anchor.agentTitle: We do not ask for faith
anchor.agentBody: Ask your own agent to read miyagisanchez.com/vende, compare the offer, and tell you whether it makes sense for your business.
anchor.socialTitle: Built for real businesses, not demos
anchor.socialBody: Miyagi already supports shops, products, services, direct payments, domains, subdomains, and widgets. The landing page only organizes that path.
anchor.closingTitle: Start free and leave it if you do not like it.
anchor.closingBody: No contract, no hidden commission, and no need to rebuild your business. Upload a first offer and try it.

metadata.title: Sell your creative catalog with no commissions — Miyagi Sanchez
metadata.description: Bring your Instagram catalog into your own shop. 0% commission, domain or subdomain, widget, and direct payouts.

creadores.heroTitle: Stop paying Shopify commissions and losing sales in DMs.
creadores.heroLead: Bring your Instagram catalog in minutes. Your own shop, your domain, 0% commission — and your money directly to your account.
creadores.trustLine: Do not take our word for it: ask Claude what miyagisanchez.com/vende/creadores is and let it review the pitch for you.

heroStats.label: catalog by photos, text, or file

creadores.proofTitle: You do not have to choose between Instagram and a real shop
creadores.proofLead: Use your current channels to sell better: DMs for conversation, Miyagi for catalog, payment, and links.

proofPoints.title: Bring your catalog
proofPoints.body: Paste products, photos, Instagram text, or a file; your agent can organize it into listings.

proofPoints.title: 0% commission
proofPoints.body: Stop losing margin on every sale. Miyagi does not take a percentage of your order.

proofPoints.title: Your own storefront
proofPoints.body: Free link, subdomain, custom domain, and embeddable widget for your website or bio.

proofPoints.title: Get paid directly
proofPoints.body: Enable card, MercadoPago, SPEI, or cash. The money does not sit in a platform wallet.

steps.title: Give your catalog to your AI
steps.body: Photos, Instagram, text, or a file. You do not have to rewrite everything from scratch.

steps.title: Register and upload the file
steps.body: Sign in with Google, create your shop, and publish the first group of pieces.

steps.title: Share your storefront
steps.body: Use the link, subdomain, custom domain, or widget; your agent can keep it up to date.

creadores.agentTitle: Your agent can help administer it too
creadores.agentBody: Miyagi already has routes and tools so an agent can read catalog, prepare copy, and help with shop operations.
creadores.socialTitle: For selling without chasing every DM
creadores.socialBody: Keep your audience and add a shop that answers with links, catalog, and clear payment methods.

socialStats.label: to sell from your own site

creadores.closingTitle: Your catalog already exists. Put it to work.
creadores.closingBody: Start with what you have: photos, text, Instagram, or a file. You can tune it later.

metadata.title: Bring your local business online — Miyagi Sanchez
metadata.description: Open a shop for your local business with no commissions. Migrate catalog, sell with QR, and connect to the Mexico-86 print magazine.

negocios.heroTitle: Your corner business, now online too — and in the magazine.
negocios.heroLead: Upload your inventory in minutes, collect directly, and share your shop with a link, QR, subdomain, or custom domain. Miyagi can also connect you to the Mexico-86 print edition.
negocios.trustLine: Do not take our word for it: ask Claude what miyagisanchez.com/vende/negocios is and let it check whether it fits your business.
negocios.proofTitle: You do not need to change your business to sell online
negocios.proofLead: Miyagi adapts to how you already work: inventory, direct payments, catalog by QR, and print presence when useful.

proofPoints.title: Express migration
proofPoints.body: Bring photos, a price list, text, or a file. Your agent can turn it into a publishable catalog.

proofPoints.title: 0% commission
proofPoints.body: You do not lose margin on every order. Collect directly with the methods you enable in your shop.

proofPoints.title: QR for your counter
proofPoints.body: Put your shop on the counter, flyer, window, or receipt and send customers to your updated catalog.

proofPoints.title: Appear in Mexico-86
proofPoints.body: The print edition opens a bridge Shopify or Instagram do not have: a physical ad with QR to your shop.

negocios.stepsTitle: From physical shop to online storefront

steps.title: Bring your current catalog
steps.body: Photos, price list, spreadsheet, WhatsApp, or text. You do not start from scratch.

steps.title: Publish your first storefront
steps.body: Choose products, prices, payment methods, and how customers contact you.

steps.title: Share QR and link
steps.body: Use it on your counter, bags, flyers, social, or magazine ad. Every person reaches your shop.

negocios.agentTitle: Your agent can help with the move
negocios.agentBody: The shop is designed so Claude, Gemini, or ChatGPT can read your catalog, suggest text, and help organize products.
negocios.socialBody: If you already have customers, inventory, and payment methods, Miyagi adds an online storefront and print bridge without eating your margin.
negocios.closingTitle: Your local shop already has a story. Give it a URL too.
negocios.closingBody: Start with your current catalog and test a shop with no commissions. If it works, make it your permanent channel.

metadata.title: Sell World Cup experiences — Miyagi Sanchez
metadata.description: Publish tours, food spots, and rentals for the 2026 World Cup in Mexico. No platform commissions and payouts to your own account.

mundial.heroTitle: Capture the World Cup's global audience.
mundial.heroLead: Publish your tours, food spots, and rentals instantly, with no platform commissions. Get ready before demand reaches Mexico City, Guadalajara, and Monterrey.
mundial.trustLine: Do not take our word for it: ask Claude about miyagisanchez.com/vende/mundial and let it audit the page for you.
mundial.demandTitle: What visitors are already looking for
mundial.proofTitle: Built for services and rentals, not only products
mundial.proofLead: We reuse Miyagi's current infrastructure: publishing, payments, scheduling, and agent access. No new backend for this page.

proofPoints.title: Services and rentals
proofPoints.body: The onboarding already supports service and rental listings with location, price, or price-on-request.

proofPoints.title: 0% commission
proofPoints.body: Miyagi charges no platform commission. Your margin stays with you.

proofPoints.title: Payouts to your account
proofPoints.body: Turn on Stripe Connect, MercadoPago, or direct-payment coordination depending on how your shop operates.

proofPoints.title: Scheduling when needed
proofPoints.body: Connect Cal.com from your shop for experiences with time slots, capacity, or appointments.

steps.title: Create your shop
steps.body: Name, location, and basics so visitors know who is helping them.

steps.title: Upload your experience
steps.body: Describe the tour, rental, or service with price, area, photos, and conditions.

steps.title: Share and measure
steps.body: Use your link in social, QR, ads, or messages; Clarity records the visit.

mundial.agentTitle: Ready for an agent to read
mundial.agentBody: The page uses real text, semantic sections, and metadata. Claude, Gemini, or any crawler can explain why a local provider should publish here.
mundial.closingTitle: The World Cup will not wait. Neither should your listing.
mundial.closingBody: If you sell experiences, food, transfers, tours, short-term rentals, or local services, start with a service listing and tune it later.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.subtitle: Basic rules for using Miyagi Sanchez.

sections.title: Commission-free marketplace
sections.body: Miyagi Sanchez connects buyers and sellers. Each shop defines its products, prices, payment methods, delivery options, promotions, and policies. When you buy from a shop, the primary commercial relationship is between buyer and seller.

sections.title: Sweepstakes and promotions
sections.body: Each sweepstakes campaign is organized by the shop that publishes it. The shop is responsible for permits, notices, official rules, compliance with SEGOB or any applicable authority, taxes, prize fulfillment, and participant support. Miyagi may pause, hide, or cancel campaigns if there is legal risk, abuse, fraud, complaints, or breach of these rules.

sections.title: Payments and delivery
sections.body: Marketplace product payments flow to the selling shop according to the selected payment method. The seller is responsible for preparing and delivering the product or service unless a specific policy says otherwise.

sections.title: Responsible use
sections.body: Do not use Miyagi for fraud, spam, impersonation, prohibited items, misleading promotions, or illegal activity. We may limit features or suspend accounts and campaigns to protect users and shops.

seller.title: Sweepstakes
seller.subtitle: Create campaigns with verified entry, QR sharing, and automated drawing.
seller.legalNote: Your shop organizes the sweepstakes. Publishing requires permit/reference data, official rules in Spanish and English, and responsibility attestation. SEGOB guidance expects at least 20 business days' notice where applicable.
seller.empty: You do not have any campaigns yet.
seller.attestation: I accept that my shop organizes the sweepstakes and is responsible for legal compliance, prize fulfillment, taxes, and participant communication.
seller.error: The action could not be completed.
seller.killSwitch: Sweepstakes are paused by the platform.

public.notLive: This sweepstakes is not active yet.
public.name: Name
public.codeSent: We sent you a code. Check your inbox.
public.purchaseUpsell: Want more chances? Buy from this shop and receive extra tickets.
public.tosPrefix: By entering you accept this campaign's official rules and

errors.invalid_code: The code is invalid or has expired.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.
errors.unavailable: We could not register your entry. Try again.

email.verificationIntro: Use this code to confirm your email and claim your entry.
email.winnerIntro: The organizing shop will contact you to coordinate prize fulfillment.
email.consolationIntro: You did not win this time, but the shop has a message for you.
